articles.title: Near Foundation spends $40 million to replace USN stablecoin’s ‘collateral gap’
articles.description: Near Foundation announced a $40 million grant toward replacing a collateral gap of USN, a decentralized stablecoin on Near Protocol that had become undercollateralized earlier this year.

articles.title: Klaytn pumps after proposal to reduce block rewards passes
articles.description: Klaytn network’s KLAY is up more than 30% to $0.2055, making it one of the best-performing digital assets this week, according to CryptoSlate data. The post Klaytn pumps after proposal to reduce block rewards passes appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Shiba Inu [SHIB]: Why investors should closely watch the latest burn reaction
articles.description: Contrary to its recent trend, Shiba Inu’s [SHIB] burn rate spiked incredibly by 1858% in the last 24 hours. According to Shibburn‘s data, the hike pushed the total SHIB burned within the period to a figure of 45,165,582 SHIB. In doing so, the total SHIB burned since initial supply is now 410.38 trillion. articles.title: Can Reddit NFTs’ launch have a positive impact on Polygon’s growth?
articles.description: Even after increasing its number of collaborations, Polygon has failed to note much growth in terms of its NFT sales.
